name: Risotto with Crabmeat & Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Arborio rice or medium-grain rice
3 1/2 ounces Fresh mild goat cheese (such as Montrachet)
1/3 cup Chopped fresh basil or 1 teaspoon Dried
recipeInstructions:
This special appetizer is served at Allegro in Santa Barbara. It was a winner.
Arborio, an Italian short-grain rice, is available at Italian markets and some specialty foods stores.
Melt butter in a heavy large saucepan over medium heat. Add minced onion and saute until translucent, about 3 minutes. Add rice and saute 1 minute. Add 1 cup chicken stock to rice, reduce heat and simmer until liquid is absorbed, stirring frequently. Continue adding enough of the remaining chicken stock, 1 cup at a time, until rice is just tender but still firm to bite, stirring frequently and allowing each addition to be absorbed before adding the next, about 20 minutes. Add whipping cream and simmer 2 minutes. Mix in goat cheese, then crabmeat and chopped basil. Season risotto to taste with salt and pepper. Serves 6.
